title: Activity log: filter “Last Week” and “Last Month”, start & end dates
excerpt: In the Activity log, it would be nice if you can select as a filter “Last Week” and “Last Month”, Otherwise we need to download in excel and filter there. Or another possibility is to select start and end dates.

posts.author: JuanCar (Juan Carlos Garcia de la Corte)
posts.cookedHtml: In the Activity log, it would be nice if you can select as a filter “Last Week” and “Last Month”, Otherwise we need to download in excel and filter there. Or another possibility is to select start and end dates.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @JuanCar ,
If you’re open to the apps, Board Email Reports does this job. It aggregates the changes in the activity log by the column you choose and over the period you choose in the automation rule, and sends the xls-report to the people you mention in the rule (no guest access needed!). For example:

image787×622 27.5 KB

The app provides the following types of reports:
On a board/project level:

  1. New and updated tasks
  2. Status updates
  3. Budget, Costs, Revenue changes
  4. Timeline and deadline overdue
  5. Time Tracking changes

On an item/task level:

  • Updates by a specific employee
  • Updates mentioning a specific employee
  • Updates containing attachments
  • Status updates
  • Last updates

I hope you’ll find the app helpful!
